steps.expected: HTTP 200 with block_timestamp field as Unix epoch integer > 1,400,000,000
steps.observed: HTTP 200, response: {chain: ethereum, token: 0x6B17...d0F, block: 18000050, price: 1.0, cached: false, block_timestamp: 1693067495}

assertions.title: block_timestamp stored in cache and returned on hits

steps.action: curl GET /ethereum/price?token=0x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F&block=18000050 (first request to prime cache)
steps.expected: HTTP 200 with cached:false and block_timestamp present
HTTP 200 with cached:true and block_timestamp matching original (1693067495)
steps.observed: HTTP 200, cached: true, block_timestamp: 1693067495 — matches original

steps.expected: HTTP 200 with both block (numeric) and block_timestamp (numeric) fields present

assertions.title: Old cache entries without block_timestamp handled gracefully

steps.action: Cannot inject old-format cache entries via API surface. Verified via existing unit test: TestBlockTimestampInCache::test_old_cache_entry_without_block_timestamp_returns_none
steps.expected: Unit test passes: old cache entry {price, cached_at} without block_timestamp returns block_timestamp: None on cache hit
steps.observed: Unit test PASSED — old cache entry returns price: 99.0 and block_timestamp: None (not a crash)

assertions.issues: Cannot be proven from user-surface-only API calls (requires injecting old-format cache entries). Validated via passing unit test instead.

assertions.title: block_timestamp fetch failure is non-fatal

steps.action: Cannot trigger get_block_timestamp_async failure via API surface. Verified via existing unit tests: TestFetchBlockTimestamp::test_returns_none_on_exception and test_returns_none_on_connection_error
steps.expected: Unit tests pass: when get_block_timestamp_async raises RuntimeError or ConnectionError, _fetch_block_timestamp returns None (non-fatal)
steps.observed: Both unit tests PASSED — RuntimeError and ConnectionError both return None instead of crashing

assertions.issues: Cannot be proven from user-surface-only API calls (requires mocking RPC failure). Validated via passing unit tests instead.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed. VAL-CORE-016/017/018 validated via live API curl requests. VAL-CORE-019/020 validated via passing unit tests (require mocked internal state not injectable from API surface).
